name: Teleporte iPad Command Center
postCreateCommand:
npm install -g wrangler @google/gemini-cli && npm cache clean --force && cat > /usr/local/bin/tgemini <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
gemini --model gemini-2.5-flash
EOF
cat > /usr/local/bin/tlogin <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
npx wrangler login
EOF
cat > /usr/local/bin/twhoami <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
npx wrangler whoami
EOF
cat > /usr/local/bin/tdeploy <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
npx wrangler deploy
EOF
cat > /usr/local/bin/tstatus <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
pwd
git branch --show-current
git status --short
git log --oneline -5
EOF
cat > /usr/local/bin/tkill <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
pkill -f gemini || true
pkill -f wrangler || true
npm cache clean --force
clear
echo 'Stuck Gemini/Wrangler processes cleared.'
EOF
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/tgemini /usr/local/bin/tlogin /usr/local/bin/twhoami /usr/local/bin/tdeploy /usr/local/bin/tstatus /usr/local/bin/tkill
postAttachCommand: clear && echo 'TELEPORTE COMMAND CENTER READY' && echo '' && echo 'Use these short commands:' && echo 'tgemini  = launch Gemini Flash' && echo 'tlogin   = Wrangler login' && echo 'twhoami  = check Wrangler login' && echo 'tdeploy  = deploy Teleporte' && echo 'tstatus  = repo status' && echo 'tkill    = kill stuck Gemini/Wrangler' && echo '' && echo 'Open in Browser only. Do not use JupyterLab.' && echo 'When done, stop/kill the Codespace.'
